case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. VS. PAUL MIBACH

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MIBACH, PAUL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-20-2011
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-12-2011 CONTINUED TO MAR-19-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-12-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. SERVED NOV-16-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIBACH, PAUL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-12-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-19-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
